Description

Shared, marshall-free test-support utilities used across the Juneau test modules.

  • Uses of Var in org.apache.juneau

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    XVar
    Dummy variable for resolving $X{...} variables.

  • Uses of Var in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl

    Subclasses of Var in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultingVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars with a default value if the resolve() method returns null.
    class 
    MapVar
    A subclass of DefaultingVar that simply pulls values from a Map.
    class 
    MultipartResolvingVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars that can have one or more keys where the first non-null resolution is returned.
    class 
    MultipartVar
    Interface for the resolution of vars that consist of a comma-delimited list.
    class 
    SimpleVar
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that resolve to simple returned string values.
    class 
    StreamedVar
    Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that write their values directly to a writer.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that return Var
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Var
    VarResolverSession.getVar(String name)
    Returns the Var with the specified name.
    protected Var[]
    VarResolver.getVars()
    Returns an array of variables define in this variable resolver context.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl that return types with arguments of type Var
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Map<String,Var>
    VarResolver.getVarMap()
    Returns an unmodifiable map of Vars associated with this context.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.svl with parameters of type Var
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VarList
    VarList.append(Var... vars)
    Adds a list of variables to this list.
    static VarList
    VarList.of(Var... vars)
    Creates a new list of variables.
    VarResolver.Builder
    VarResolver.Builder.vars(Var... values)
    Register new variables with this resolver.
